steps.title: Find the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is "Coaches in the IWBF." The prepositional phrase "in the IWBF" does not change the subject; "Coaches" is plural. The sentence describes an ongoing practice, so it needs a plural present-tense verb.

steps.title: Reject singular verbs
steps.content: Choice A uses singular "is." Choice B uses singular "has." Choice D uses singular "uses." None agrees with the plural subject "Coaches." The answer is C.
